text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While eagerly awaiting her showdown with Eishin
Flash in the Arima Kinen, Gold Ship
suddenly—like, alarmingly suddenly―discovers
the power of beauty!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship plans to take over the world with her
beauty, but when the avatar of beauty T.M.
Opera O overhears this, she simply cannot let it
slide!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Two elegant auras clash with enough intensity to
make anyone nauseous, in a battle through which
beauty standards may not survive. Neither side
yields...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, they acknowledge each other as
worthy foes. The beauty of Gold Ship and T.M.
Opera O's friendship is beyond words... Their
battle ends in a draw!
